// what this is: The buttons a contributor actually uses. Terminal > Run Task, or Ctrl+Shift+B for the preview.

tasks.label: Preview the manual
tasks.detail: Builds the manual and keeps it open, refreshing as you type.

tasks.label: Check writing style
tasks.detail: Checks the manual against the Spiri style guide.

tasks.label: Check the manual for problems
tasks.detail: Builds once and reports anything wrong -- broken links, a revision that cannot be issued.
tasks.command: uv run sphinx-build -b html -W docs docs/_build/html

tasks.label: Update the tooling
tasks.detail: Pulls the latest build setup from the template. Answer any questions in the terminal, then review the changes before committing.

tasks.label: Build a PDF
tasks.detail: Builds the PDF and opens it. The first run installs LaTeX and takes a few minutes; CI builds this for you on release.
